channel.title: Novella on Damu's Corner
channel.description: Recent content in Novella on Damu's Corner

item.title: temp
item.description: There is a famous story you might have heard in which a meddling god meets his end at the hands of a forest dweller who mistakes his feet for a bird and shoots it, leading to the god bleeding out. This culminates in the end of not just the god, but his dynasty and the age of gods. Magic ends and society goes through several millennia before it reaches the highs of the past.
